dwarf_desc: Sturdy and resilient dwellers of the deep mountains, master craftsmen and warriors.
elf_desc: Graceful and wise guardians of the ancient forests, skilled in magic and archery.
human_desc: Versatile and ambitious builders of empires, adaptable to any path they choose.
orc_desc: Fierce and powerful warriors of the wild wastes, valuing strength and honor in battle.
wolf_desc: A loyal and swift predator, hunting in perfect harmony with its master.
bear_desc: A massive and powerful guardian, shielding its allies with immense strength.
snake_desc: A venomous and elusive hunter, striking silently from the shadows.
eagle_desc: A majestic and sharp-eyed raptor, soaring high to strike from above.
bat_desc: A nocturnal creature that disorients foes with its erratic movements.
crocodile_desc: An armored river predator with a bone-crushing bite and unrelenting patience.
hyena_desc: A cunning scavenger that laughs in the face of danger and overwhelms prey in packs.
infernal can_desc: A demonic creature born of fire and shadow, burning anything it touches.
lizard_desc: A quick and cold-blooded companion that blends into its surroundings with ease.
pegasus_desc: A legendary winged horse that carries its master across any battlefield.
rat_desc: A scrappy and resourceful rodent, nimble enough to slip past any defence.
spider_desc: A patient predator that ensnares enemies in its web before closing in for the kill.
three headed dog_desc: A fearsome guardian of the underworld with three ferocious heads.
tiger_desc: A fearless apex predator of immense speed and devastating strikeforce.
unicorn_desc: A pure and magical creature whose horn channels powerful healing energy.
vulture_desc: A grim carrion bird that circles overhead, striking when prey is at its weakest.
bite_desc: Sinks sharp teeth into the target, causing physical damage.
maul_desc: A brutal swipe that deals heavy damage and stuns the target.
poison bite_desc: Bites the target, injecting venom that deals damage over time.
swoop_desc: Dives rapidly from above to strike and blind the target.
black_desc: Wielders of forbidden shadow magic, masters of dark and destructive forces.
red_desc: Wielders of raging fire magic, channeling the destructive fury of flame.
green_desc: Wielders of wild nature magic, calling upon the living strength of the earth.
white_desc: Wielders of frozen ice magic, freezing and shattering their enemies.
shadowbolt_desc: Fires a bolt of pure shadow energy at the enemy.
frostbolt_desc: Launches a freezing shard of ice to slow and damage enemies.
heal_desc: Saves your life by restoring lost health with healing light.
warrior_desc: A master of arms and armor, relying on physical strength and battlefield tactics.
mage_desc: A scholar of arcane mysteries, wielding powerful spells to manipulate reality.
rogue_desc: A stealthy and agile fighter, utilizing shadows, traps, and precision strikes.
druid_desc: A guardian of nature, summoning a loyal wolf companion.
slash_desc: A powerful physical strike that deals high physical damage.
firebolt_desc: Launches a flaming projectile dealing fire damage.
backstab_desc: A stealthy strike from behind that deals critical damage.
regrowth_desc: Heals the target over time with nature's power.
gold_desc: Gold is used to shop, craft equipment, rest, and pay for useful supplies.
active_points_desc: Active points are spent on actions such as hunting, questing, training, crafting, resting, and shopping. When they run out, you level up and get more AP.
iron skin_desc: Toughened skin that reduces incoming physical damage.
arcane flow_desc: Mystical attunement that regenerates mana over time.
fleet footed_desc: Lightning reflexes that boost initiative and evasion.
wild bond_desc: A deep bond with nature that empowers your companion.
name: Name
hunt_desc: Go hunting in the wild to earn gold.
quest_desc: Embark on an adventure to earn gold and find new equipment.
train_desc: Train hard to increase a random attribute.
craft_desc: Craft a piece of equipment suitable for your level.
work_desc_base: Earn gold by working. Scales with Level and Charisma.
rest_desc_base: Rest to recover health and mana. Scales with Level and Wisdom.
study_desc_base: Study tomes and scrolls. Scales with Intelligence.
level_up_subtitle: Allocate attribute points and select a new ability and perk to continue.
